changelog:
Version 2.2.0 - Major Update

✅ REALISTIC VEHICLES:
• Sedan with hood, windshield, roof, trunk
• Pickup with detailed cab and bed
• 18-Wheeler with cab and trailer
• Motorcycle with handlebars
• All vehicles have proper windows and details

✅ FIXED SCROLLBAR:
• Working vertical scrollbar on toolbox
• Mouse wheel scrolling enabled
• Smooth scrolling experience

✅ IMPROVED PDF EXPORT:
• Captures actual diagram content
• Professional layout with title and metadata
• PostScript rendering for quality
• Fallback to object list if capture fails

✅ NO SYMBOLS ON BUTTONS:
• Clean text-only buttons
• Professional appearance
• Better readability

✅ MAXIMIZED CANVAS:
• Canvas fills all remaining screen space
• Window size: 1400x900
• Larger working area
